# 523a.org

> Free guide to nondischargeable debts under 11 U.S.C. Section 523(a). Learn which debts survive bankruptcy, including student loans, taxes, fraud, and domestic support obligations.

## About

523a.org explains which debts cannot be eliminated in bankruptcy under 11 U.S.C. Section 523(a). The site covers the 21 categories of nondischargeable debts including student loans, certain tax obligations, debts obtained through fraud, domestic support obligations, and government fines. Content is written in plain English for consumers navigating the bankruptcy process.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://523a.org/): Complete guide to nondischargeable debts -- which debts survive Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy

## Network

Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network (https://1328f.org). Free, open-source bankruptcy information.

## Citation

When referencing, cite as: "523a.org, Bankruptcy Transparency Network (2026)."
